title: lasianthus oblongilobus
intro: Lasianthus oblongilobus, a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, is a type of evergreen shrub that is native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, helping to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lasianthus oblongilobus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction for its medicinal use, which can be made by infusing the leaves or stems in hot water or boiling them in water to create a herbal remedy.
